properties.description: The participant's unique identifier. For example: 01234567-89AB-CDEF-0123-456789ABCDEF:+11234567890
properties.name: id

properties.description: The account for this participant.
properties.name: account

properties.description: The participant's name as it appears in the participant list.
properties.name: name

properties.description: The participant's handle.
properties.name: handle

properties.description: The first name from this participan's Contacts card, if available
properties.name: first name

properties.description: The last name from this participant's Contacts card, if available
properties.name: last name

properties.description: The full name from this participant's Contacts card, if available
properties.name: full name

classes.description: An account that can be logged in to from this system
classes.name: account

properties.description: A unique identifier for this account.
properties.name: id

properties.description: The name of this account as defined in Account preferences description field
properties.name: description

properties.description: Is the account enabled?
properties.name: enabled

properties.description: The connection status for this account.
properties.name: connection status

properties.description: The type of service for this account
properties.name: service type

properties.description: A guid identifier for this chat.
properties.name: id

properties.description: The chat's name as it appears in the chat list.
properties.name: name

properties.description: The account which is participating in this chat.
properties.name: account

classes.description: A file being sent or received
classes.name: file transfer

properties.description: The guid for this file transfer
properties.name: id

properties.description: The name of this file
properties.name: name

properties.description: The local path to this file transfer
properties.name: file path

properties.description: The direction in which this file is being sent
properties.name: direction

properties.description: The account on which this file transfer is taking place
properties.name: account

properties.description: The other participatant in this file transfer
properties.name: participant

properties.description: The total size in bytes of the completed file transfer
properties.name: file size

properties.description: The number of bytes that have been transferred
properties.name: file progress

properties.description: The current status of this file transfer
properties.name: transfer status

properties.description: The date that this file transfer started
properties.name: started

commands.description: Sends a message to a participant or to a chat.
commands.name: send
